# `hr-payroll` — hr-payroll templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 4

Phishing templates impersonating HR and payroll systems — high-value targets for payroll diversion

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Benefits Open Enrollment | [`benefits_enrollment.html`](benefits_enrollment.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 45-65% |

| HR Year-End Bonus Notification | [`year_end_bonus.html`](year_end_bonus.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 45-65% |

## Template details

### Benefits Open Enrollment

- **File:** [`benefits_enrollment.html`](benefits_enrollment.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hr_payroll_education.html`](education/hr_payroll_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Benefits Enrollment closes Friday — complete your selections
  - HR: Open enrollment period ends soon — action required
  - Your benefits enrollment is incomplete
- **Operator notes:** Best used during actual open enrollment periods (typically Q4) for maximum believability.

### Payroll Direct Deposit Update

- **File:** [`payroll_direct_deposit.html`](payroll_direct_deposit.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hr_payroll_education.html`](education/hr_payroll_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - HR: Update your direct deposit information before Thursday
  - Payroll: Action required — banking information needs verification
  - Important: Direct deposit change required for upcoming payroll
- **Operator notes:** HIGH VALUE: Payroll diversion attacks are among the most financially damaging. Time near payroll processing dates for maximum click rate.

### HR Open Enrollment Reminder

- **File:** [`open_enrollment_reminder.html`](open_enrollment_reminder.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hr_payroll_education.html`](education/hr_payroll_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - ACTION REQUIRED: Annual Employee Benefits Election Deadline
  - URGENT: Benefits Open Enrollment Period Ending Soon
  - Enrollment Notice: Action required for your health benefits selection
- **Operator notes:** Annual open enrollment deadlines are standard seasonal corporate events. Employees are highly motivated to click to avoid losing health benefits coverage.

### HR Year-End Bonus Notification

- **File:** [`year_end_bonus.html`](year_end_bonus.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/hr_payroll_education.html`](education/hr_payroll_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - CONFIDENTIAL: Company Year-End Bonus Statement & Payout details
  - Year-End Bonus Notice: Verify payroll details for bonus disbursement
  - Payroll: Review your year-end bonus calculation
- **Operator notes:** Year-end bonuses are highly anticipated events. Phishing simulations using bonus lures have high click rates due to greed and curiosity triggers.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
